feature.name: Dataclass JSON serde core
feature.description: Extract dataclass to/from JSON with field config, letter-case transforms, and exclusion predicates without original dataclasses_json import.
included_behaviors: round-trip dataclass instances through JSON and dict payloads
apply class-level and field-level letter case transforms
exclude fields via config predicates and Exclude helpers
register per-type encoders and decoders via config and global_config
excluded_behaviors: marshmallow schema generation and mm_field validation
CatchAll undefined INCLUDE mode and schema dump hooks
upstream tests, docs, CI, and packaging metadata

entanglement.description: dataclasses-json couples dataclass introspection, field metadata merging, letter-case encoding, exclusion predicates, undefined-parameter actions, and recursive decode across api, core, cfg, utils, stringcase, and undefined modules.
signals: FieldOverride merges global, class, and field-level dataclasses_json metadata
LetterCase transforms must round-trip consistently on encode and decode
_decode_dataclass recurses into nested dataclass fields with type hints

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import DataClassJsonMixin, LetterCase, Exclude, Undefined, dataclass_json, config, global_config; from featurelifted.undefined import UndefinedParameterError
